storico.createFromFileTip: Create mocks from this whole file

dati.title: Data
dati.subtitle: json files reusable in handlers
dati.emptyHint: Upload a JSON file to reference it in handlers with data('name').
dati.emptyDetail: Upload a JSON file to get started.
dati.selectFile: Select a file to see its content.
dati.largeFileTip: File over 5 MB: reading it is paid on every request that calls data().
dati.copyRefTip: Copy the data('name') snippet to paste into a handler
dati.toastOnlyJsonDesc: The Data page accepts only .json files.
dati.toastLargeDesc: Over 5 MB: reading it is paid on every request that calls data().
dati.usedByBadgeTip: {{count}} endpoints reference this file with data()
dati.usedByCaveat: Detects data('name') references written as a string; dynamic ones (name from a variable) are not visible.
dati.renameRewrite: also update the data() references in the handlers ({{count}})
dati.renameRewriteAria: Update the data() references in the handlers
dati.toastRenamedRewritten: data() references updated ({{count}}) — check any dynamic data() calls
dati.deleteWarnUsed: {{count}} endpoints use this file with data(): deleting it will break them.

runtimeBar.monitorTip: Live traffic capture (active across all views until paused)
runtimeBar.dumpTipOff: Save the history to disk (beyond the 250 kept in RAM)
runtimeBar.flushTip: Write queued requests to disk now

appPreferences.title: App preferences
appPreferences.subtitle: Global preferences, independent of the workspace
appPreferences.errorLogHint: Writes app and engine errors to a logs/ folder next to the executable. Turn off to stop writing files to disk.

workspaceSettings.portInteger: The port must be an integer.
workspaceSettings.title: Workspace settings
workspaceSettings.titleHint: Name shown in the tabs (shared with the team). Empty = folder name ({{name}}).
workspaceSettings.portHint: Changing the port restarts the workspace server and reloads the window.
workspaceSettings.portInUse: Port {{port}} is already in use. Choose another one.
workspaceSettings.backendUrlHint: Real backend URL to proxy non-mocked requests to. Empty = mock-only.
workspaceSettings.backendUrlInvalid: Invalid URL: use an absolute address, e.g. http://localhost:8080.
workspaceSettings.exposeNetworkWarning: ⚠ When on, the app listens on 0.0.0.0 and is reachable by anyone on the network. The admin API creates handlers and runs code: whoever reaches this port can execute code on this machine. Use only on trusted networks, at your own risk.
workspaceSettings.exposeNetworkHint: Off = this computer only (127.0.0.1). On = bind on 0.0.0.0, reachable from other devices on the network. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.caseInsensitiveFiltersHint: Automatic list filters (?key=value) compare values ignoring letter case. Changing it restarts the workspace server and reloads the window.
workspaceSettings.numberInteger: The value must be an integer.
workspaceSettings.proxyFallbackHint: On a request with no matching mock, forward it to the real backend; when off it returns 404 (mock-only). Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.corsHint: Answers browser preflight requests and sets the CORS headers (echoing the request origin, credentials allowed) on every response served, overriding any CORS policy from captured mocks or the proxied backend. Only needed when a frontend on another origin calls this server directly. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.adaptCookiesHint: Removes the Domain, Secure and SameSite=None attributes from Set-Cookie headers forwarded from the real backend, so session cookies bind to this server and survive over http. Turn it off to observe the backend's original Set-Cookie headers. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.rewriteRedirectsHint: When a proxied redirect points at the backend's own address, rewrites the Location header to this server's address so the browser stays on Mockxy (login flows, trailing-slash redirects). Relative and third-party redirects pass untouched. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.globalDelayHint: Delay applied to every mock that has no delayMs of its own. 0 = no delay. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.delayAllHint: Apply the global delay to backend-forwarded requests as well, not just mocks. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.requestTimeoutHint: Maximum wait for proxied requests and handlers. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.monitorDumpIntervalHint: How often the monitor dump is written to disk. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.monitorDumpThresholdHint: Number of pending entries that forces a flush before the cadence. Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.monitorDumpMaxFileHint: Beyond this size the dump file rotates. Default 52428800 (50 MB). Changing it restarts the workspace server.
workspaceSettings.monitorDumpMaxTotalHint: Once the cap is exceeded, the oldest dumps are deleted. 0 = pruning off. Default 1073741824 (1 GB). Changing it restarts the workspace server.

monitor.emptyFiltered: No requests match the current filter.
monitor.resizeHint: Drag to resize · double-click to reset
monitor.goToDefinitionTip: Open the definition in the catalog
monitor.sequenceStepTip: Sequence step that served this request
monitor.coveringMockTip: This route is now covered by a catalog mock
monitor.coveringMockDisabledTip: This route has a catalog mock, but it is disabled
monitor.mockExistsDesc: The catalog already has an endpoint for
monitor.mockExistsQuestion: Do you want to add the captured response as a new variant? It will become the selected variant.
monitor.toastResponseAddedDesc: {{method}} {{path}} — the captured response is now the selected variant
monitor.waitingDesc: Send a request to Mockxy: it will appear here with headers, payload and routing.

mocks.subtitle: Catalog
mocks.resizeHint: Drag to resize · double-click to reset

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.emptyWorkspaceHint: No mocks here yet. Create the first one with «New» or import from OpenAPI.
catalog.dissolveCollectionTip: Removes the collection and its subcollections, moving all endpoints to Unsorted.
catalog.eraseCollectionTip: Permanently erases the collection, its subcollections, and all contained endpoints.
catalog.eraseUnsortedTip: Permanently erases all Unsorted endpoints, including those hidden by the current filters.

detail.sequenceTip: Variant sequence: the response evolves over time
detail.sequenceTipActive: Sequence active: the endpoint serves the steps, not the selected variant
detail.templatedTip: Replaces placeholders in body and headers: params.id, query.x, headers.x, body.field, now, uuid, randomInt 1 10 — inside double braces. Type filter: params.id | number.
detail.atLeastOneResponseTip: At least one response must remain
detail.presetConfirm: Replace status and body with the «{{label}}» preset? The current body will be replaced.
detail.insertBundleTip: Insert a ready-made set of headers (CORS, security, …)
detail.fileEmpty: Drag a file here, or click to choose one
detail.fileHint: Content-type from the file (overridable via header) · max 12 MB
detail.selectEndpoint: Select an endpoint from the catalog.

createDialog.title: New {{type}}
createDialog.dropHint: Drag a file here, or click to choose one
createDialog.fileContentTypeHint: Content-type from the file (overridable via header) · max 12 MB

copyDialog.title: Copy endpoint
copyDialog.copyAllResponsesHint: If off, copies only the currently selected response.

wsConsole.connectionTip: Connection: ▶ sent / ◀ received messages and script position
wsConsole.empty: No messages yet: connect a client (WebSocket) or send something from here.
wsConsole.resendTip: Send this payload to every connection
wsConsole.dataPlaceholder: data — JSON or text (Ctrl+Enter to send)
wsConsole.noConnections: No client connected: the message is only in the transcript

sseConsole.connectionTip: Connection: events sent and script position
sseConsole.empty: No messages yet: connect a client (EventSource) or send something from here.
sseConsole.dataPlaceholder: data — JSON or text (Ctrl+Enter to send)
sseConsole.noConnections: No client connected: the message is only in the history

sequenceDialog.title: Variant sequence
sequenceDialog.needVariants: A sequence needs at least two mock or handler variants: create another one from the Response list.
sequenceDialog.autoResetHint: With no requests for this long, the sequence restarts from the first step at the next call.
sequenceDialog.resetDone: Sequence restarted from the first step
sequenceDialog.errStepResponse: Each step must reference a variant.
sequenceDialog.errStepValue: Each non-final step requires an integer value ≥ 1.
sequenceDialog.errAutoReset: Auto-reset requires an integer value ≥ 1 (or empty to disable it).

openapiImport.title: Import OpenAPI
openapiImport.dropHint: Drag an OpenAPI document here, or click to choose one
openapiImport.dropToImport: Drop the file to import it
openapiImport.errUnsupported: Unsupported format: choose a .json, .yaml or .yml file.

shortcuts.title: Editor shortcuts
shortcuts.macHint: On macOS use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.

pathError.convention: Path not compatible with the collection convention.
